heroHeadline: Iran Signals Iraqi Ships May Transit Strait of Hormuz as Shipping Traffic Ticks Upward
heroSubtitle: Iran indicated Iraqi-flagged vessels may pass through the Strait of Hormuz as transit numbers show a modest uptick, hinting at selective easing of maritime pressure. The move follows weeks of near-total commercial blockade and mines laid in the strait since March 2026.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-05. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post.
